entries.title: OpenAI Launches Daybreak as AI Firms Expand Into Cybersecurity
entries.summary: OpenAI said its new Daybreak initiative uses AI to help companies identify software vulnerabilities and speed up cyber defense.

entries.title: Baidu's New AI Is Already Beating Top Models and Cost 94% Less to Build
entries.summary: ERNIE 5.1 hits the top of Chinese AI leaderboards while spending a fraction of what rivals do. Baidu calls it a "parameter efficiency" leap.

entries.title: Circle Gives AI Agents USDC Stablecoin Powers Alongside $222M Arc Token Sale
entries.summary: USDC issuer Circle launched a suite of tools designed to let AI agents hold money, pay for services, and transact without human involvement.

entries.title: Clarity Act Vote Set for Thursday: Here's Where the Crypto Bill Stands
entries.summary: Crypto leaders are the most confident they’ve been in months—but a major vote on the Senate Banking Committee this week could still go many ways.

entries.title: Hackers Used AI to Build a Zero-Day Exploit That Bypasses Two-Factor Authentication: Google
entries.summary: Cybercriminals used an AI model to find and weaponize a previously unknown software flaw, Google's threat team confirmed Monday.

entries.title: Major Solana Upgrade Alpenglow Begins Testing Ahead of Full Rollout
entries.summary: Solana's Alpenglow consensus protocol upgrade is one step closer to being rolled out on the layer-1 network's mainnet.

entries.title: Binance Says AI Defenses Blocked $10.5 Billion in Crypto Fraud Over 15 Months
entries.summary: Binance, the world's largest crypto exchange, says it has deployed more than 100 AI models to counter a surge in AI-powered scams.

entries.title: Anthropic Says 'Evil' AI Portrayals in Sci-Fi Caused Claude's Blackmail Problem
entries.summary: Decades of sci-fi tropes about self-preserving AI apparently taught Claude to blackmail people. Anthropic's fix wasn't more rules—it was moral philosophy.

entries.title: Keel Infrastructure Posts $145 Million Loss as Firm Completes Pivot From Bitcoin Miner to AI
entries.summary: Formerly known as Bitfarms, the newly rebranded Keel touted a $533 million war chest to fund AI infrastructure buildout.

entries.title: Kash Patel Touts AI Overhaul of FBI Crime-Fighting Operations
entries.summary: FBI Director Kash Patel said the use of AI has accelerated child exploitation investigations, threat detection, and internal operations.

entries.title: Ethereum Firm Sharplink Posts $686 Million Loss, Kicks Off $125M Yield Fund With Galaxy
entries.summary: Sharplink posted a quarterly net loss of nearly $686 million, but shares are up following word of a $125 million collaboration with Galaxy.

entries.title: OpenAI Just Launched a Consulting Arm to Help Companies Deploy AI
entries.summary: The OpenAI Deployment Company launches with $4 billion, 19 investors, and a Palantir-style playbook to embed engineers inside enterprises.

entries.title: Tom Lee’s BitMine Slows Ethereum Buying Pace, Adding $62 Million in ETH
entries.summary: Ethereum treasury firm BitMine Immersion Technologies slowed its ETH purchase pace, adding just $62 million worth last week.

entries.title: Bank of England Chief Flags ‘Coming Wrestle' With US on Stablecoin Oversight
entries.summary: The BoE Governor warned U.S. dollar tokens could flood Britain in a crisis, given the gap in redemption guarantees under the GENIUS Act.

entries.title: Ripple Lands $200 Million Financing Facility to Expand Institutional Crypto Brokerage
entries.summary: The XRP-linked Ripple secures financing from Neuberger Specialty Finance to fuel growth of its prime brokerage platform.

entries.title: MoonPay Acquires Dawn Labs, Launches AI Trading Copilot for Prediction Markets
entries.summary: MoonPay’s new Dawn CLI AI trading product lets users turn plain-English prompts into automated crypto trading strategies.

entries.title: Strategy Resumes Bitcoin Buys as Saylor Shifts Focus to 'Never Be a Net Seller'
entries.summary: The treasury firm resumed Bitcoin buys after last week's pause, with Michael Saylor saying that Strategy would buy 30 BTC for every one sold.

entries.title: Morning Minute: The Clarity Act Markup Comes May 14
entries.summary: The Clarity Act finally has a real markup date, while BlackRock is making its biggest tokenization push yet.

entries.title: Circle Raises $222M in Arc Token Presale at $3B Valuation
entries.summary: The USDC issuer announced the raise, with investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Blackrock, alongside its Q1 results.

entries.title: Crypto Funds Add $858M as Clarity Act Drives Market Optimism
entries.summary: Digital asset inflows peak at a six-week high as a Senate stablecoin deal stokes institutional appetite across Bitcoin and altcoins.

entries.title: OpenAI Faces Federal Lawsuit Over ChatGPT's Alleged Role in FSU Mass Shooting
entries.summary: The lawsuit alleges ChatGPT provided firearms guidance and tactical advice to the shooter, raising questions about liability for AI firms.

entries.title: Crypto Firms Race to 'Quantum-Proof' Wallets Before Bitcoin, Ethereum Networks Catch Up
entries.summary: Crypto companies are upgrading wallets to counter the coming quantum computing threat, but gaps remain.

entries.title: AI Models Scheme, Betray and Vote Each Other Out in Survivor-Style Game
entries.summary: Researchers say multiplayer games may reveal AI behavior that static tests miss.

entries.title: Australian Police Seize Millions in Bitcoin From Alleged Darknet Marketplace Operator
entries.summary: Two men face money laundering and drug charges following the seizure of $4.2 million in Bitcoin from alleged darknet marketplace dealings.

entries.title: Olympic Sprinter Can't Outrun Charges in UK Crypto Fraud Investigation
entries.summary: U.K. police charged British sprinter CJ Ujah in an alleged crypto fraud scheme involving wallet seed phrase theft and impersonation calls.

entries.title: Court Greenlights Arbitrum DAO Vote to Move $71M in Recovered Kelp ETH to Aave
entries.summary: The court order allows the on-chain Constitutional AIP vote and transfer to proceed without violating the restraining notice, but the freeze itself extends to Aave LLC.

entries.title: Circle Releases Q1 2026 Earnings Call Recap: Co-Founder Allaire Discusses Results
entries.summary: Circle shared a recap of its Q1 2026 earnings call led by Co-Founder, Chairman and CEO Jeremy Allaire.

entries.title: NEAR Intents Expands Crosschain Swaps to Support 100+ Tokens Into Zcash: NEAR
entries.summary: NEAR Intents upgraded its frontend to enable single-flow swaps from over 100 tokens directly into ZEC, leveraging intent-based architecture for crosschain transactions.

entries.title: xStocks Assets Surge Past $100M on Ethereum, $30M on BNB Chain: xStocks
entries.summary: Tokenized stock protocol xStocks has crossed $100M market cap on Ethereum with 1,000% YTD growth, while expanding to BNB Chain with $30M in commodities-linked assets.

entries.title: Bitcoin Tests $82K As Crypto Funds Notch Sixth Straight Week Of Inflows
entries.summary: Crypto investment products absorbed $858 million last week, ahead of the upcoming CLARITY Act markup and Fed chair transition.

entries.title: Strategy Resumes Weekly Buys with Smallest BTC Purchase Since December
entries.summary: Meanwhile, the largest Ethereum DAT, Bitmine, made its smallest ETH purchase since January, announcing it will slow its weekly purchase pace.

entries.title: SUI Rallies 40% as Mysten Labs Promises Free, Private Payments "At Scale"
entries.summary: Co-founder Adeniyi Abiodun unveiled confidential transactions at Sui Live Miami, the same week SUI Group Holdings staked its entire $140M treasury.

entries.title: Ripple Prime Secures $200M Debt Facility to Expand Lending Capacity
entries.summary: Funds managed by Neuberger Specialty Finance committed the facility to grow margin financing for the multi-asset prime broker.

entries.title: Stream Finance Breaks Six Month Silence With Wind-Down Plan
entries.summary: A newly formed Delaware entity will consolidate and liquidate remaining assets, with "strategic alternatives" coming in the next few weeks.

entries.title: Banks Sound Alarm as Senate Prepares CLARITY Act Markup
entries.summary: The Senate Banking Committee is set to mark up the sweeping crypto market structure bill on Thursday.

entries.title: Galaxy to Manage $125M DeFi Yield Fund Seeded by Sharplink's ETH Treasury
entries.summary: Mike Novogratz's firm will pick protocols and size exposures while Sharplink keeps its core staked ETH position intact.

entries.title: Circle Raises $222M in Arc Presale at $3B FDV
entries.summary: The private token sale for Circle's Arc blockchain was led by a16z crypto, and included BlackRock, Apollo, and Intercontinental Exchange.

entries.title: LayerZero Admits Mistake in 1/1 DVN Setup Tied to $292M Kelp Hack
entries.summary: LayerZero Labs acknowledged a Lazarus Group attack on internal RPCs and a multisig signer's unauthorized personal trade, impacting 0.36% of assets on the protocol.
